title: Preaching Until the Seventh Day
summary: “Of every clean beast thou shalt take to thee by sevens, the male and his female: and of beasts that are not clean by two, the male and his female. Of fowls also of the air by sevens, the male and the female; to keep seed alive upon the face of all the earth.” (Genesis 7:2-3). It took 120 years to build the ark. This means that Noah had to explain and preach about the purpose of the ark for 120 years. The closer Noah’s generation approached the day of the flood, the higher the height of the ark.We can be sure that some were irritated by the sight of this massive and strange object that obscured their view,while others decided it was time to approach the architect and inquire about its purpose.In a similar vein, as our generation gets closer to the day of the Lord’s return, they must not fail to hear the Word of God – like the burgeoning ark, the word of God must confront their field of view. “And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations; and then shall the end come”(Matthew 24:14). May we share the word of God in such a way that, like Noah’s ark, it will demand a response–some will quarrel with us while others may politely come to gaze at us–but let us pray the word of God will demand a response, Amen!
